extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings against the Bank from proceedings by the Bank and matters involving the Promoter and Directors. I counted only the against rows: criminal proceedings are 1 against the Bank plus 1 against Directors (2 total); regulatory proceedings are 1 against the Bank; and tax matters are 3 against the Bank, while all proceedings by the Bank and Promoter/Director personal matters were excluded. The quantified litigation amount against the Bank is ₹18.75 million regulatory plus ₹20.13 million tax, totaling ₹38.88 million, or ₹3.888 crore; the table-wide Total of ₹1,547.66 million was not used because it includes by and other-entity matters. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated Total of ₹265.58 million as of September 30, 2019, converted to ₹26.558 crore. The only customer concentration percentages disclosed relate to deposits, not company-wide revenue from operations or total income, so the top-five and top-ten revenue fields are not applicable.
